app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.50 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for improved server visibility, cleaner server labels, and better stream recovery.
releaseNotes: Stream startup now publishes priority and main server results progressively
The first working stream can start while other server groups keep warming
Server recovery keeps warmed candidates available in the selector
Main server waits were shortened so hanging endpoints do not block the selector
Server C candidates are no longer hidden when upstream labels them differently
Server labels no longer repeat the same quality twice

items.title: The Cube 2.0.50
items.message: Server visibility and recovery were improved, with cleaner server labels.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: PLZ USE VPN FOR SERVERS FOR NOW(PROTON VPN/ DOWNLOAD MOVIE .THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked.THE CUBE is a passion project. I don't get paid for this, there are no ads inside the app, and nothing is malicious.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
